# MuleSoft API Manager

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.x) of API Manager documentation.
> See [API Manager llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-manager/llms-full.txt) for all the API Manager documentation in one file.

## Content
